CREATE TABLE example_dict (id UInt64, value Int32) ENGINE = Dictionary('example_dict');
CREATE TABLE main_table (key UInt64, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY key;
SELECT mt.key, dictGetInt32('example_dict', 'value', mt.key) AS dict_value FROM main_table mt;
SELECT mt.key, dictGetInt32OrDefault('example_dict', 'value', mt.key, -1) AS dict_value FROM main_table mt LEFT JOIN example_dict ed ON mt.key = ed.id;
CREATE TABLE example_dict2 (id UInt64, ip_address IPv4) ENGINE = Dictionary('example_dict2');
SELECT mt.data, dictGetUInt64('example_dict', 'value', mt.key) AS dict_value FROM main_table mt WHERE dictGetInt32('example_dict', 'value', mt.key) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT dictGetUInt64OrDefault('example_dict', 'value', 3, 100) + dictGetInt32('example_dict', 'value', 1) AS combined_value FROM main_table;
